users.expected_users: macOS users who run local AI tasks while the lid is closed

requirements.auth: No account auth; local admin approval is limited to two explicit pmset commands

selected.hosting: local macOS app bundle distributed through GitHub

decision.reason: The existing dependency-free AppKit app already owns the menu bar, hot key, and pmset safety boundary; extending it keeps installation and maintenance small.
rejected_options: SwiftUI: unnecessary lifecycle migration for one compact control window
Electron: excessive runtime and distribution weight for a local power switch
Objective-C rewrite: no user benefit and higher regression risk
